prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从2021年第135名持续上升至2026年第85名，排名提升显著，反映学校综合实力稳步增强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要因招聘公告设置不当条件引发舆情，学校已终止招聘并致歉，对报考心理有一定抑制；抖音热度排名第76位（一般），短视频平台曝光度中等偏低；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中植物保护获评A-，为唯一A类学科，与该校农林特色一致，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 相关工科类专业社会热度平稳；辽宁省2026年普通高考总人数约20万人，较2025年（约19.97万）微增，按历史比例估算物理类考生约14.36万人，竞争略有加剧；贵州大学位于贵州省贵阳市，距辽宁省较远，跨省就读的地域偏好对辽宁考生报考意愿有一定抑制作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动较大、2026年招生计划持平、软科排名持续上升但声誉偏负面、本省考生数微增等因素，在2025年基准33652名基础上预计竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约33700名，区间33200–34200名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 22120 → 20899 → 25421 → 38994 → 33652, showing a fluctuating and declining trend overall. In 2024, it dropped significantly to about 38994, then rebounded to about 33652 in 2025, with large fluctuations over the past 5 years. The 2025 baseline is about 33652. The planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category from 2021 to 2025 were 30 → 31 → 32 → 38 → 36, with 36 planned for 2025. The 2026 plan remains 36, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science main ranking has risen continuously from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, a significant improvement reflecting steadily enhanced comprehensive strength. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to inappropriate conditions set in a recruitment announcement that sparked public opinion. The university has terminated the recruitment and apologized, which may somewhat suppress application willingness. Its Douyin popularity ranks 76th (average), with moderately low exposure on short video platforms. No obvious admission gaps have been recorded. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Plant Protection was rated A-, the only A-class discipline, consistent with the university's agricultural and forestry characteristics, attracting some interest in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of related engineering majors is stable. In 2026, the total number of general college entrance exam takers in Liaoning Province is about 200,000, a slight increase from about 199,700 in 2025. Based on historical proportions, an estimated 143,600 are Physics Category examinees, leading to slightly intensified competition. Guizhou University is located in Guiyang City, Guizhou Province, far from Liaoning Province. The regional preference for cross-province study somewhat suppresses the willingness of Liaoning examinees to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as large historical ranking fluctuations, unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, continuously rising Soft Science ranking but negative reputation, and a slight increase in local examinees, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 33652. The predicted minimum ranking is about 33700, with a range of 33200–34200.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 33200–34200, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 33000), you can focus on stretching for popular engineering majors like Automation and Electrical Category in Tier 1. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 34000), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 majors with Tier 3 as safety, and be cautious with Tier 1 majors.
